events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes form build & bracing work that is rough-complete, with the checkpoint scope finished for the area. Remaining work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside the checkpoint. No defects or hazards are mentioned. Reference is ACI 347 (Guide to Formwork for Concrete).

Since the work is described as finished for the checkpoint scope with no defects flagged, this should be a pass. Risk is low. Work stage is rough-complete. Percent complete should be high, maybe 95-98% since only cleanup/labeling remains. Component conditions: none flagged, so empty list. Confidence high since the scenario is clear.
